headline: Quiet day with no meetings, emails, or Slack activity — use the open calendar to drive progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079) and fix broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce authentication — check SALESFORCE_* env vars and re-authenticate
quick_wins.why: Escalation visibility is completely blind right now; any open customer issues are invisible to you

quick_wins.task: Fix Snowflake credentials — password is empty
quick_wins.why: Metrics dashboard is down; you can't track agents-in-production or evals adoption trends without it

must_make_progress.task: Draft or significantly advance AE-1079: 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket; evals is a key 26.4 deliverable called out in the Big Rock OKR page, and no due date means it could drift indefinitely

must_make_progress.task: Review Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page for latest evals, context engineering, and memory roadmap updates
must_make_progress.why: Stay current on cross-team deliverables (Dragos/Tomasz ML updates, Jordan's DeepRAG/patterns, Scott's memory roadmap) that may affect your design doc scope

must_communicate_with.about: Align on how 'no ground truth' evals intersect with validation patterns (DeepRAG, BatchTransform) and any template dependencies
Get latest model-level inputs for the generated evals design — confirm feasibility of LLM-as-judge or synthetic ground truth approaches

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 progress on no-ground-truth evals design
must_report_status.note: Proactively share status before next bi-weekly TR to avoid being flagged as stalled

flags: Salesforce auth is broken — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. This is a blind spot that could hide critical issues.
Snowflake metrics pipeline is down — no ability to track product telemetry or funnel health ahead of next Big Rock TR.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of silent drift on a key evals deliverable. Consider setting a target date today.
Autopilot is flagged as Risk Yellow in the OKR page — monitor for any spillover impact on your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — restoring Salesforce and Snowflake access would immediately recover escalation visibility and metric tracking capability.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data is unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079) is the highest-leverage adoption-driving work available today.

slack_summary: Quiet day: no meetings, emails, or Slack activity. Top priority is making real progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc) — your only active Jira ticket and a key 26.4 deliverable. Second priority: fix broken Salesforce and Snowflake integrations so you regain visibility into customer escalations and product metrics. Zero meetings today — protect the deep work time.
